name: Swing Rite Golf Center & Gun Shop
about: Swing Rite Golf Center & Gun Shop is a multi-faceted venue combining a full-service golf experience with indoor simulation and a pro shop, alongside a gun retail section. The facility features 3 Trackman-powered simulator bays with over 300 courses available, alongside an outdoor driving range, club fitting services, and a stocked pro shop. It is a hub for golfers to practice, play, and shop year-round, offering a casual environment for both solo practice and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 technology for precise shot data and fittings
Wide variety of major golf brands available in pro shop
Option to bring alcohol for a relaxed social experience
Club fitting and repair services available on-site
Outdoor driving range for year-round practice

food_and_drink.notes: No hot food prepared on-site, but delivery is available from nearby restaurants
Cold beer and various soft drinks available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 simulator bays equipped with Trackman 4 launch monitors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use the demo clubs and equipment available on-site for fittings or practice.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside alcohol is not mentioned, but they sell beer and soft drinks. No hot food is served, but you can have food delivered from nearby restaurants.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally one hour per person is enough to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Rite serves as the headquarters for the Lima Junior Golf Association and offers a welcoming environment for families.
